data.body: Hypothesis: harvest-worktree.sh is called from within the agent worktree (CWD = worktree path). When inside the worktree, git symbolic-ref HEAD returns refs/heads/WORKTREE_BRANCH. The --is-ancestor check at line 108 evaluates '--is-ancestor X X' (a commit is always an ancestor of itself) → returns 0 → falsely reports 'already merged' → exits 0 without merging. Fix: add a preflight guard checking if symbolic-ref HEAD == refs/heads/WORKTREE_BRANCH and exit 1 with a descriptive error. RED test: test_harvest_errors_when_called_from_inside_worktree (test 20) confirmed failing. Approved for implementation.
